labels.ideal_content_profile: Close-up shots of family or a couple at golden hour. Slow motion candid laughs, hand-held b-roll, lingering eye contact.
Fast-cut friend group montages with bright neon nightlife or daytime city b-roll. High motion, lots of faces.
Wide landscape shots, slow drone pulls, intimate close-ups intercut with sky and horizon. Emotional storytelling.
Street-level lifestyle, fashion close-ups, choreographed reactions, fast cuts that hit on the beat.
